summary.rationale: The songs index now behaves like a compact working list. Redundant header copy, long visible summaries, and long key-center row strings were removed without changing navigation or adding visual noise.

notes: There is still one primary row action: open a song.
No destructive action or unsafe workflow was introduced.
Scanability improved by reducing prose density.
Representative rows fit desktop and mobile widths.
No avoidable redundant local labels or stacked explanations were added.
The restrained warm utility profile is preserved.
The page now uses whitespace for grouping rather than marketing-style air.
No banned visual-noise stack, high-chroma accent, or nested-card pattern was introduced.
The result is quieter and denser while retaining the existing tone and row interaction.
